{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320114657D3361A1D122A7A7D9BA2\"}"},"total":31},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7602977953120961304","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"其实我觉得还行，比番茄大部分书强，起码三观正，看这勤劳程度也非常值得鼓励，但感觉看的人不多，希望作者能坚持写完"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770209508,"group_id":"7575869759124687934","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx/5JAAdLSbj91T6zl6IvkU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a2f7337df5594ce9892de76b5397a7aa~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776534890\u0026x-signature=GpB4ZayHPmmczD0dMibWiVYs3%2Bk%3D","user_id":"904211341259812","user_name":"穿山甲说了啥"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"904211341259812","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{\"icon_default_url\":\"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48\",\"icon_dark_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f\",\"icon_width\":26,\"icon_height\":16}","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"vip\",\"title_id\":\"vip\",\"icon_type\":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575869759124687934","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越者林枫来到历史断层的平行世界，创立洪荒游戏，凭借前世知识重现华夏史诗。从《大秦》到《汉武大帝》，他用极致沉浸的游戏震撼世界。当新作《三国鼎立》面临创作瓶颈时，他毅然选择最难的道路——以“乱世求生”为核心，让玩家从饥荒中的流民起步，在白骨露野的废墟里挣扎求生。当那句“苍天已死，黄天当立”响彻云霄，当英雄传奇与残酷现实激烈碰撞，一部颠覆传统的三国史诗就此展开。这是游戏与历史的完美融合，更是文明火种的重燃。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/5908cfea5c1105b47063624bf793b5ec~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"ws小丑","author_id":"","book_id":"7575869759124687934","book_name":"在没有历史的世界做历史游戏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#505050","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1928人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":263,\"name\":\"都市种田\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263\u0026name=都市种田\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":66,\"name\":\"洪荒\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66\u0026name=洪荒\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":500,\"name\":\"断层\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=500\u0026name=断层\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7575869766888342078","read_count":"1928","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"798531"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"324","tags":"都市种田,都市,穿越,断层,洪荒","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/37e952f5f42939aa0477e9da56e53667~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779162417\u0026x-signature=loRSZJsix9ZElduFA6ZjCDgWkJs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109399674071","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"262"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320114657D3361A1D122A7A7D9BA2\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_dura
